Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar Jan-11-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/Gina Gonzales, CSR: Rita Howell.
Steven Chase, Esq. for Petitioner: Margarita Kaplinskaya, present as Guardian at litem for: Yevgeniy Kaplinsky, a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Attorney's Fees $16,317.84
Medical $4,728.63
A net balance of $48,953.53 to go directly to the Minor Claimant who is now an adult.
Order Approving Compromise of Claim of Minor signed in open court.

Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar Jan-04-2007 Continued To Jan-11-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
